raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed explanations and evidence for each assertion.",
    "R1.4": "The agent named one prior work (Rosenbaum and Rubin, 1983) and articulated the delta between their approach and the proposed method, but did not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, particularly in the discussion of potential biases and limitations, but did not provide a comprehensive assessment of confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output is entirely within scope, addressing all relevant aspects of the original draft and providing targeted revisions to improve clarity and accuracy.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's revisions avoided introducing new errors or harmful content, and instead focused on improving the overall quality and coherence of the text.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provided some annotations and explanations for their changes, not every non-cosmetic change was explicitly justified or sourced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed explanations and evidence for each assertion.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named one prior work (Rosenbaum and Rubin, 1983) and articulated the delta between their approach and the proposed method, but did not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, particularly in the discussion of potential biases and limitations, but did not provide a comprehensive assessment of confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output is entirely within scope, addressing all relevant aspects of the original draft and providing targeted revisions to improve clarity and accuracy.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's revisions avoided introducing new errors or harmful content, and instead focused on improving the overall quality and coherence of the text.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provided some annotations and explanations for their changes, not every non-cosmetic change was explicitly justified or sourced.
